description.description: Provides a brief summary of the VPC Link's purpose or functionality; required when creating the resource.

name.description: Specifies the name of the VPC link for identifying the resource in AWS API Gateway.

tags.description: Tags to assign to the VPC link for categorization or identification purposes; must be key-value pairs.

target_arns.description: Specifies the ARNs of the network load balancers used for the VPC link. Must be valid AWS NLB ARNs.
